name: Lemon Tea Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat with a mixer to blend butter, sugar, eggs, milk, and vanilla. Stir in flour and pecans until all ingredients are evenly moistened. Pour batter into an oiled and flour-dusted 8-inch square pan. Bake in a 350°F oven until cake is lightly browned and springs back when pressed in the center, about 45 minutes.
2. Run a knife between the cake and pan rim; hold a rack over the pan. Invert to release the cake, then tip it back into the pan. Pierce the cake top all over with a fork and pour hot lemon sauce over the surface. Serve hot or warm; cut from the pan or serve from a platter.
LEMON SAUCE
In a 1-1/2 quart pan over high heat, stir together lemon peel, lemon juice, and sugar just until the sugar is dissolved. Use hot.
